=======
 Files
=======

This catalog contains the following files:

#. ``aliases.json``: sample aliases file

Valid FB2 file samples:

#. ``cp1251_simple.fb2``: FB2 sample file in CP1251
#. ``koi8r_simple.fb2``: FB2 sample file in KOI8-R
#. ``no_xml_decl.fb2``: FB2 sample file with no explicit XML declaration
#. ``utf8_simple.fb2``: FB2 sample file in UTF8
#. ``zipped.fb2.zip``: FB2 sample file compressed with ZIP
